nodes.label: ReviewPanel
nodes.description: React component implementing the Smart Review (المراجعة الذكية) flashcard interface for students. Renders a flippable card deck with progress tracking, correct/incorrect scoring, card type tagging (case/term/etc.), and session controls.

nodes.label: ReviewPanel.tsx
nodes.summary: React component implementing the Smart Review (المراجعة الذكية) flashcard quiz panel in the student section. Renders multiple-choice question cards drawn from the cases bank with progress tracking and answer selection.

nodes.label: ReviewPanel
nodes.description: React component implementing the Smart Review panel in the Student View. Provides flashcard and quiz review modes sourced from terms bank, cases bank, and lectures with subject/classification filters.

nodes.label: ReviewPanel
nodes.description: Smart Review panel (المراجعة الذكية) for law students. Runs timed quiz sessions, tracks correct/incorrect answers, and shows a session-complete result card with score percentage, answer counts, elapsed time, and options to review missed items or start a new session.

nodes.label: ReviewPanel
nodes.description: Smart Review (المراجعة الذكية) panel within the Student View. Implements a gamified flashcard/quiz session flow. Displays a session-completion screen with score percentage, correct-answer count, total cards reviewed, time duration, and action buttons to start a new session or return to review navigation.

nodes.label: ReviewPanel
nodes.description: Recent lectures panel (أحدث المحاضرات). Lists lecture cards with status badges: مسودة (Draft) and تمت المراجعة (Reviewed). Lectures cover criminal intent (القصد الجنائي), contract nullity (انعدام الأهلية), and Rida defects (عيوب الرضا).

properties.description: Review panel within the student view. Likely renders the daily legal brief sidebar (الموجز اليومي) showing news from Saudi Ministry of Justice, HR Ministry, and Zakat Authority.
